title: cyclosorus esquirolii
intro: Cyclosorus esquirolii, also known as the Esquiroli's leather fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus esquirolii are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
